title: Icarae Origin
description: Adds Origins Support for the Icarus Mod
body:
This mod bridges the gap between Origins and Icarus, and adds an Icarae Origin when installed.



## This Origin will give you the following abilities:
- You start with wings (equipping Icarus wings is still possible to change their appearance, but they will not use durability)
- you start with less health
- you cant fly when wet or on fire
- you start burning when flying too high
- you can only eat meat
